detectors.description:
Reentrancy in InariOkami._transfer(address,address,uint256) (InariOkami.sol#655-779):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (InariOkami.sol#719)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (InariOkami.sol#793-805)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (InariOkami.sol#725)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (InariOkami.sol#813)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (InariOkami.sol#777)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (InariOkami.sol#939)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (InariOkami.sol#919)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (InariOkami.sol#921)
	InariOkami._rOwned (InariOkami.sol#331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- InariOkami._takeTeam(uint256) (InariOkami.sol#933-941)
	- InariOkami._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (InariOkami.sol#893-929)
	- InariOkami.balanceOf(address) (InariOkami.sol#481-485)
	- InariOkami.constructor() (InariOkami.sol#415-445)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (InariOkami.sol#777)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (InariOkami.sol#947)
	InariOkami._rTotal (InariOkami.sol#343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- InariOkami._getCurrentSupply() (InariOkami.sol#1089-1099)
	- InariOkami._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (InariOkami.sol#945-951)
	- InariOkami.constructor() (InariOkami.sol#415-445)
	- InariOkami.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (InariOkami.sol#577-599)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [InariOkami._transfer(address,address,uint256)](InariOkami.sol#L655-L779):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](InariOkami.sol#L719)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](InariOkami.sol#L793-L805)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](InariOkami.sol#L725)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](InariOkami.sol#L813)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](InariOkami.sol#L777)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](InariOkami.sol#L939)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](InariOkami.sol#L919)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](InariOkami.sol#L921)
	[InariOkami._rOwned](InariOkami.sol#L331) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [InariOkami._takeTeam(uint256)](InariOkami.sol#L933-L941)
	- [InariOkami._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](InariOkami.sol#L893-L929)
	- [InariOkami.balanceOf(address)](InariOkami.sol#L481-L485)
	- [InariOkami.constructor()](InariOkami.sol#L415-L445)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](InariOkami.sol#L777)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](InariOkami.sol#L947)
	[InariOkami._rTotal](InariOkami.sol#L343) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [InariOkami._getCurrentSupply()](InariOkami.sol#L1089-L1099)
	- [InariOkami._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](InariOkami.sol#L945-L951)
	- [InariOkami.constructor()](InariOkami.sol#L415-L445)
	- [InariOkami.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](InariOkami.sol#L577-L599)
